pull_request.title: feat: add PR governance
pull_request.body:
## Description

Add a required PR governance check and commit-msg enforcement.

Closes #123

## Type of Change

- [x] New feature (non-breaking change that adds functionality)

## Changes Made

- Added workflow validation for PR template completeness.
- Added a commit-msg hook that runs commitlint locally.

## Testing

- [x] Unit tests pass (`pytest`)
- [x] Manual testing performed

### Test Output

```text
pytest scripts/tests/test_pr_governance.py -q
```

## Real Behavior Proof

- Environment: Ubuntu runner, Python 3.12
- Exact command / steps: Opened a PR with an incomplete template, then fixed the body.
- Observed result: The governance check failed until the template and readiness boxes were complete.
- Not tested: Repository-level automatic Copilot rulesets.

## Review Readiness

- [x] I have performed a self-review
- [x] This PR is ready for human review
